documents.title: Store Shipping Policy
documents.content:
# Shipping Policy
Orders to Canada usually arrive in 5-7 business days.
Orders to the United States usually arrive in 3-5 business days.

# Returns Policy
Returns are accepted within 30 days for unopened items.

documents.title: Stream Setup Notes
documents.content:
# Camera Setup
Use Camera 2 for face cam during solo streams.

# Audio Setup
Set OBS audio monitoring to Monitor and Output when routing alerts.

# Knowledge Base
RAG search answers from the custom knowledge base before the bot replies.

documents.title: Weekly Stream Schedule
documents.content: Tuesday is retro night. Friday is community games night. Saturday starts at 7 PM Eastern.

cases.canadaQuestion: How long does shipping to Canada take?

expected.descriptor: Knowledge base with store shipping timelines, stream setup notes, and the weekly stream schedule.
expected.canadaAnswer: Orders to Canada usually arrive in 5-7 business days.
